title: Le vicomte de Bragelonne, Tome II.
summaries: "Le vicomte de Bragelonne, Tome II." by Alexandre Dumas and Auguste Maquet is a novel published between 1847-1850. This final installment of the Musketeers trilogy follows the aging heroes as they navigate the glittering court of young Louis XIV. D'Artagnan and Athos embark on separate missions involving the English restoration and French political intrigue, while the novel weaves together romance, loyalty, and one of history's greatest mysteries: the man in the iron mask.
